130→class TestOneShot: 131→ """Tests for one_shot MCP tool.""" 132→ 133→ @patch("erk_mcp.server._run_erk") 134→ def test_passes_prompt_to_erk(self, mock_run_erk: patch) -> None: 135→ json_output = '{"success": true, "pr_number": 42, "pr_url": "https://github.com/test/repo/pull/42", "run_url": "https://github.com/test/repo/actions/runs/123", "run_id": "123", "branch_name": "plnd/fix-bug-03-09-1234"}' 136→ mock_run_erk.return_value = subprocess.CompletedProcess( 137→ args=[], returncode=0, stdout=json_output, stderr="" 138→ ) 139→ 140→ result = one_shot(prompt="Fix the bug in auth") 141→ 142→ assert result == json_output 143→ mock_run_erk.assert_called_once_with(["one-shot", "--json", "Fix the bug in auth"]) 144→ 145→ @patch("erk_mcp.server._run_erk") 146→ def test_propagates_runtime_error(self, mock_run_erk: patch) -> None: 147→ mock_run_erk.side_effect = RuntimeError("erk one-shot --json failed (exit 1): timeout") 148→ 149→ with pytest.raises(RuntimeError, match="timeout"):

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of the changes:
**PR #9067**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9067
### Changes Made
1. **`src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py`** — Added `--json` Click option. When passed, the command captures the `OneShotDispatchResult` from `dispatch_one_shot_remote()` and emits structured JSON via `machine_output()` to stdout. In dry-run mode, emits `{"success": true, "dry_run": true}`.
2. **`packages/erk-mcp/src/erk_mcp/server.py`** — Updated `one_shot()` MCP tool to pass `--json` to the CLI args, so `result.stdout` now contains the structured JSON instead of an empty string.
3. **`packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py`** — Updated `TestOneShot` tests to expect `--json` in the args and valid JSON in stdout.
4. **`tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot.py`** — Added two new tests: `test_one_shot_json_output` (verifies JSON schema with PR/run URLs) and `test_one_shot_json_dry_run` (verifies dry-run JSON output).
### Verification
- All 29 one-shot tests pass - All 13 MCP server tests pass - ruff lint clean - ty type check clean
